examples: I trimmed two centimetres off the hem of the skirt.
She lifted the hem of her dress and brushed her knees.
Madeleine showered and put on her first spring dress: an apple-green baby-doll dress with a bib collar and a high hem.
Marion Cotillard was chic in a navy and white Dior couture gown with a cutaway hem.
Who you bring to the prom is under as much scrutiny as the hem of your dress.
